title: Unified Flows, Recording, and Replay
overview: Wire flows, recording, chain, and replay together. Recording becomes the canonical capture model, all execution goes through executeCommand(), flows work on any AutomationTarget.
scopeChallenge: All pieces exist (executeCommand, lifecycle hooks, recording after-hook, flow parser, 3 export formats). We're connecting them, not building from scratch. EXPANSION mode for comprehensive test coverage of nested recording, app target flows, and edge cases.

failureModes.risk: Circular imports: flows.ts → executor.ts → registry.ts → index.ts → flows.ts
failureModes.mitigation: Use dynamic await import() for executor in flows.ts

failureModes.risk: Lifecycle hooks fire for both outer flow + inner steps
writeCapture closure conflict in nested execution
failureModes.mitigation: Sequential step execution means before/after hooks don't overlap

failureModes.risk: App target gets browser-only export format
failureModes.mitigation: Guard at export time, not recording time
Fall back to BROWSE_LOCAL_DIR or .browse/ — never /tmp

tasks.title: Type lastRecording on Session and deduplicate RecordedStep
tasks.description: Remove _lastRecording property-bag hack. Add typed lastRecording field to Session interface in src/session/manager.ts. Deduplicate RecordedStep — import from src/export/record.ts, re-export from src/session/manager.ts. Replace all (currentSession as any)._lastRecording in src/commands/meta/recording.ts and src/commands/meta/flows.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Session interface has lastRecording: RecordedStep[] | null field
Zero occurrences of (currentSession as any)._lastRecording in codebase
RecordedStep imported from src/export/record.ts, re-exported from src/session/manager.ts

tasks.title: Add lifecycle field to CommandContext
tasks.description: Add lifecycle?: CommandLifecycle field to CommandContext in src/automation/command.ts. Update src/server.ts to include the lifecycle in the context passed to executeCommand(). This threads transport recording hooks into the context so flow/chain can forward them to sub-step executeCommand() calls.
acceptanceCriteria: CommandContext has lifecycle?: CommandLifecycle field
Server passes lifecycle into context alongside target/buffers/session
npx tsc --noEmit passes

tasks.title: Export findProjectRoot() from config
tasks.description: Extract the project-root detection logic from loadConfig() in src/config.ts into a separate exported findProjectRoot() function. loadConfig() calls it internally. Flow and recording commands use it to resolve flowPaths relative to project root.
acceptanceCriteria: findProjectRoot() exported from src/config.ts, returns string | null
loadConfig() uses findProjectRoot() internally with same behavior
No change to existing loadConfig() return values

tasks.title: Widen meta dispatch appMetaCommands for flow/chain/record
tasks.description: In src/commands/meta/index.ts, expand appMetaCommands set at line 104 to include flow, chain, doctor, sessions, session-close, record. Do NOT include state (browser storage), retry, watch (getPage), har, video (browser API). Change handleMetaCommand signature from bm: BrowserTarget to target: AutomationTarget. Thread lifecycle?: CommandLifecycle parameter to handleFlowsCommand and handleSystemCommand.
acceptanceCriteria: --platform android --app com.example flow <file> reaches handleFlowsCommand without 'not available' error
state save, har start, video start still blocked for app targets with clear error
handleMetaCommand accepts AutomationTarget — browser sub-handlers cast internally

tasks.title: Make flows target-neutral + route through executeCommand()
tasks.description: In src/commands/meta/flows.ts, change bm: BrowserTarget to target: AutomationTarget. Accept lifecycle?: CommandLifecycle parameter. Replace all direct handleReadCommand/handleWriteCommand/handleMetaCommand dispatch with executeCommand() calls that forward lifecycle. Extract shared executeFlowSteps() helper (duplicated between flow <file> at lines 222-256 and flow run <name> at lines 136-169). For retry (line 274) and watch (line 334): add runtime guard.
acceptanceCriteria: Flow sub-steps go through executeCommand() — verified by recording being captured
flow run and flow <file> share executeFlowSteps() helper
retry and watch throw clear error on non-browser targets
Existing flow YAML files execute identically

tasks.title: Make chain target-neutral + route through executeCommand()
tasks.description: In src/commands/meta/system.ts, change bm: BrowserTarget to target: AutomationTarget. Accept lifecycle?: CommandLifecycle parameter. In chain case, replace hardcoded WRITE_SET/READ_SET (lines 69-70) with executeCommand() calls forwarding lifecycle. Keep policy check. Guard status/url with runtime check.
acceptanceCriteria: Chain sub-steps go through executeCommand() — recording captures individual steps
Hardcoded WRITE_SET/READ_SET removed — routing derived from registry
status/url still work on browser targets, throw clear error on app targets

tasks.title: Add skipRecording + targetSupport: browser to registry
tasks.description: In src/automation/registry.ts, add skipRecording: true to flow, chain, retry, watch specs. Mark retry and watch as targetSupport: 'browser' for proper capability errors on app targets.
acceptanceCriteria: flow command itself not recorded when recording active — only sub-steps
retry on Android session fails with 'not available for android-app targets' from executor
chain command itself not recorded — sub-steps are

tasks.title: Split recording into target-neutral and browser-only
tasks.description: In src/commands/meta/recording.ts, change bm: BrowserTarget to accept AutomationTarget. Guard har and video with browser-only check. Guard record export replay and playwright to reject for non-browser sessions. record start/stop/status and record export browse are target-neutral.
acceptanceCriteria: record start/stop works on Android sessions
record export browse works on Android sessions
record export replay on Android session → 'replay export requires a browser session'
har start on Android session → 'HAR recording requires a browser session'

tasks.title: Add flow as a recording export format
tasks.description: Add exportFlowYaml(steps: RecordedStep[]): string to src/export/record.ts. Extract YAML serialization from flows.ts lines 87-99. Add flow format to record export in recording.ts. Update flow save to call exportFlowYaml().
acceptanceCriteria: record export flow produces valid YAML that flow <file> can execute
flow save uses exportFlowYaml() — no inline YAML generation
Round-trip: record start → commands → record export flow → flow <file> succeeds

tasks.title: Fix flows dir to use config-root-aware resolution
tasks.description: Replace BROWSE_LOCAL_DIR || '/tmp' in src/commands/meta/flows.ts with proper resolution: (1) browse.json flowPaths resolved relative to project root via findProjectRoot(), (2) BROWSE_LOCAL_DIR/flows, (3) .browse/flows as last resort. Remove /tmp fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: flow save myflow stores to <project-root>/.browse/flows/myflow.yaml
browse.json with flowPaths resolves relative to project root
No flows saved to /tmp when project root exists

tasks.title: Integration tests — flow execution through executor
tasks.description: Test that flows route through executeCommand(), lifecycle hooks fire, and recording captures sub-steps. Test both browser and mock app targets. Test nested flow doesn't create duplicate recordings.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: record start → flow run → record stop → recording contains individual sub-steps
Test: flow with unsupported command on app target → fails with capability error at step
Test: nested flow doesn't create duplicate recordings

tasks.title: Integration tests — chain through executor + export formats
tasks.description: Test chain dispatch through executeCommand(), recording of chain sub-steps, and export format restrictions.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: chain on browser session — sub-steps recorded individually
Test: record export flow produces valid YAML → flow re-executes
Test: record export replay on non-browser session → rejects with clear error

tasks.title: Edge case tests — nested flows, recursive recording, app targets
tasks.description: Test edge cases: retry/watch browser-only gating, export format restrictions on app sessions, skipRecording on wrapper commands.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: retry on app target → 'not available for android-app targets' from executor
Test: watch on app target → same capability error
Test: record export playwright on app session → rejects, record export browse → succeeds

tasks.title: Update docs — README workflow commands section
tasks.description: Update README workflow commands section to document record export flow, flow execution on app targets, browser-only commands. Update CHANGELOG.
acceptanceCriteria: README documents record export flow format
README notes which workflow commands are browser-only
CHANGELOG has entry for unified flows/recording

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md reference docs
tasks.description: Update architecture.md and exports-reference.md to reflect lifecycle threading, exportFlowYaml, findProjectRoot, widened appMetaCommands, CommandContext.lifecycle field.
acceptanceCriteria: Architecture doc shows lifecycle threading through flows/chain
Exports reference lists exportFlowYaml, findProjectRoot
Command context docs mention lifecycle field
